title: ranunculus integerrimus
intro: Ranunculus integerrimus, also known as whole-leaved buttercup, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its distinctive whole-lobed leaves and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ranunculus integerrimus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing irritated skin. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be used internally to treat various ailments or applied topically to affected areas.
